title: rubus hedycarpus subsp. procerus
intro: Rubus hedycarpus subsp. procerus, also known as the California bramble or thimbleberry, is a subspecies of the bramble plant native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus hedycarpus subsp. procerus include its potential to aid in reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
